llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 11.7 (Approval of the 2021-22 Consolidated Application for Federal Funding Programs) was moved to consent agenda during the Changes to the Agenda section at the beginning of the meeting.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Maria makes a motion. Cecilia seconds. Roll call vote, please. Trustee Wells. Aye. Trustee Lawson. Aye. Trustee Marquez. Aye. Vice President Diazlocum. Aye. President McAvoy. Aye.
